} } if (!types.length) { return; } return (0, _util.createUnionType)(types); } function getConstantViolationsBefore(binding, path, functions) { const violations = binding.constantViolations.slice(); violations.unshift(binding.path); return status === "before"; }); } function inferAnnotationFromBinaryExpression(name, path) { const operator = path.node.operator; const right = path.get("right").resolve(); const left = path.get("left").resolve(); if (typeof typeValue !== "string") return; return createTypeAnnotationBasedOnTypeof(typeValue); } function getParentConditionalPath(binding, path, name) { let parentPath; while (parentPath = path.parentPath) { if (parentPath.isIfStatement() || parentPath.isConditionalExpression()) { if (path.key === "test") { return;
